start: ^ICT Personel: Greetings! What brings you to the Information and Communication Technology Unit?
continue_1: ^ICT Personel: You can find our office on the second floor of this building.
continue_2: ^ICT Personel: The Information and Communication Technology Unit, or ICTU, helps ensure faster and more efficient dissemination of information and guidelines to students.
continue_3: ^ICT Personel: We provide efficient services using various online media platforms across the university.
continue_4: ^ICT Personel: We also handle the maintenance of all ICT systems for university facilities.
continue_5: ^ICT Personel: This includes the data center, the audio-visual center, and the computer laboratories.
continue_6: ^You: The caretakers of BukSU’s digital resources. Now that’s a cool yet challenging task.
continue_8: ^ICT Personel: You could say that all the university’s digital data passes through the systems we maintain.
continue_9: ^ICT Personel: Speaking of maintenance, make sure to maintain good grades as well.
